series_metadata.series_description: Records related to legal cases involving the agency, including but not limited to, related communications, pleadings, memorandum, affidavits, attorney work product, legal research, motions, judgements, discovery, evidence, transcripts, correspondence, settlement and negotiation documents, subpoenas, hearing and deposition materials.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: electronic version has been created, or no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
